leadText: The Magma Suit (Japanese: マグマスーツ Magma Suit) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Omega Ruby , the Magma Suit allows the player to reach Groudon 's chamber in the Cave of Origin . It is later used in the climax of the Delta Episode to ride Mega Rayquaza into space and confront Deoxys .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A suit made with the collective technological know-how of Team Magma. It can withstand any impact.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] A replica of the Magma Suit helmet can be bought from Atticus at the Porto Marinada Market in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet .
